description_long: This ornate sconce features a central stem with intricate scrollwork arms radiating outward, each supporting a downward-facing lampshade. The fixture is suspended from a decorative ceiling mount, with the stem exhibiting a twisted, rope-like design. The lampshades are bell-shaped and appear to be made of frosted or matte glass, each adorned with small decorative finials at their lower edges. The arms and central body are crafted in a classic, baroque style with elaborate curves and flourishes, suggesting a vintage or traditional aesthetic. The color palette is primarily a soft, metallic silver or white for the body and shades, contrasted by a darker, possibly black or deep bronze ceiling mount. This sconce is designed to provide ambient lighting while serving as a decorative focal point in upscale urban interiors or historic public spaces.
description: An ornate, multi-arm ceiling sconce with bell-shaped glass shades and elaborate scrollwork, finished in silver and black. The fixture exudes a vintage, baroque style with decorative detailing.
description_view_0: Three of the sconce's lampshades are prominently visible, with the scrollwork arms and central stem partially obscured.
description_view_1: All five lampshades are visible, symmetrically arranged around the central stem, showcasing the full decorative scrollwork.
description_view_2: Three lampshades are visible from a different angle, with the scrollwork arms and central stem more exposed on the left side.
description_view_3: Four lampshades are visible, with the central stem and scrollwork arms clearly displayed, highlighting the fixture's symmetry.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture features a vintage, baroque-inspired design with elaborate scrollwork and decorative finials. Its ornate style is reminiscent of classic European chandeliers, emphasizing elegance and sophistication.
